title: coelogyne bandaharaensis
intro: Coelogyne bandaharaensis is a species of orchid native to Sri Lanka, specifically found in the mountainous regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Coelogyne bandaharaensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Coelogyne bandaharaensis involve boiling the plant's roots and leaves in water to create a decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
